title: Hall-Response / Chern-Number Cross-Source Fusion Record
summary: Fusion record for the Lecture Two flagship family: Witten provides the response-theory and many-body proof spine, TKNN is fused locally through the traced-curvature identity and the occupied-projector formula, and the Haldane lattice-realization side is decomposed through explicit graphene Hamiltonian, Dirac-point, symmetry-protection, and valley-mass Chern-number units while original-paper archival mapping still remains to be deepened.
assumptions: The Witten and TKNN core routes now contribute explicit local derivation units.
The Haldane branch now has a local graphene/Dirac-point/symmetry/mass-sign bridge, but its original-paper equation-level mapping is still being expanded.
scope: Durable fusion record for the Hall-response theorem family.
